user.title: PIMA Alarm
user.description: Select your PIMA hardware family. Detection works for both legacy net4pro panels and (soon) the newer Force JSON panels.

legacy.title: Connect to PIMA (net4pro)
legacy.description: Leave **Host** blank to auto-scan the LAN. Leave **Zones** on *Auto-detect* and the panel itself will tell us 96 vs 144. Leave **Partitions** blank to auto-detect which ones are configured. The **access code** can be either a user or installer code — whichever the panel accepts for remote operation (many installs require the installer code).

modern.title: Connect to PIMA Force / Vision
modern.description:
Force panels dial **into** Home Assistant — there's nothing for us to scan for. Pick a free TCP port (default 9999) and we'll listen on it.

Then open the **PIMALINK 2.0** app → installer settings → Network and point the panel at `{ha_ip}:<the port below>`. The first frame the panel sends will auto-learn its account ID, zone count, partition list, zone names, and fault state — no need to type any of that here.

The **access code** is whichever user / master / installer code your panel accepts for remote API calls.

pick_panel.title: Multiple PIMA panels found
pick_panel.description: The LAN scan returned more than one matching device. Pick the one you want to connect to.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the panel. Check that net4pro is online and the port is correct.
error.invalid_auth: The access code was rejected by the panel. Many installs require the installer (master) code rather than a user code for remote IP access.
error.invalid_partitions: Partitions must be a comma-separated list of numbers between 1 and 16.
error.scan_no_panel: No PIMA panel was found on the LAN. Enter the host manually.
error.unknown: Unexpected error talking to the panel.

abort.already_configured: This PIMA panel is already configured.

init.title: PIMA options
init.description: Adjust the access code, partition list, polling interval, or whether HA prompts for a code before arming/disarming.

data.require_code: Require code in HA UI to arm/disarm

error.invalid_partitions: Partitions must be a comma-separated list of numbers between 1 and 16.

bypass_zone.name: Bypass zone
bypass_zone.description: Toggle the bypass flag for a single zone on the panel.
